sections.title: 1. Data Controller
content: The controller of personal data is Ginger Partner, based in Rzeszów.

sections.title: 2. Scope of Processed Data
content: We may process the following data: full name, phone number, email address, city, and information provided through the contact form.
Providing data is voluntary but necessary for contact purposes.

sections.title: 3. Purpose of Data Processing
content: Data is processed for the purpose of contact regarding cooperation and driver recruitment.
The legal basis for data processing is Article 6(1)(b) and (f) of the GDPR.

sections.title: 4. Data Recipients
content: Data may be shared with entities operating contact forms and IT service providers.
Personal data is not sold to third parties.

sections.title: 5. Data Retention Period
content: Data is stored for the duration of the cooperation or until consent is withdrawn.

sections.title: 6. Your Rights
content: You have the right to access your data, rectify it, delete it, restrict its processing, and lodge a complaint with the competent data protection authority.

sections.title: 7. Cookies
content: The website may use cookies to ensure proper functionality and traffic analysis.
You can manage cookie settings in your browser.
